audit_status.source_base: Hebrew Leviticus / Vayiqra severe holiness penalty text tradition, draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: First-pass draft reviewed for Molech/child-sacrifice, mediums/familiar spirits, parental dishonor, sexual-boundary penalties, holiness/separation, food distinctions, and land warning. Strong anti-violence and anti-weaponization safeguards required.

verses.restored: YHWH spoke to Moses, saying,

To children of Israel you shall say: Any man from children of Israel or from sojourners sojourning in Israel who gives from his seed to Molech shall surely be put to death; people of land shall stone him with stone.
I myself will set my face against that man and cut him off from midst of his people, because he gave from his seed to Molech, to make my sanctuary unclean and profane my holy name.
If hiding, people of land hide their eyes from that man when he gives from his seed to Molech, not putting him to death,
then I will set my face against that man and against his clan, and cut him off and all who prostitute after him, prostituting after Molech, from midst of their people.
The soul/life who turns to ghosts/mediums and familiar spirits, prostituting after them, I will set my face against that soul/life and cut him off from midst of his people.
Sanctify yourselves and be holy, for I am YHWH your Divine.
You shall keep my statutes and do them. I am YHWH who sanctifies you.
Any man who curses his father or mother shall surely be put to death; his father or mother he cursed, his bloodguilt is on him.
A man who commits adultery with wife of a man, who commits adultery with wife of his companion, adulterer and adulteress shall surely be put to death.
A man who lies with his father's wife has uncovered nakedness of his father; both shall surely be put to death; their bloodguilt is on them.
A man who lies with his daughter-in-law, both shall surely be put to death; confusion/violation they have done; their bloodguilt is on them.
A man who lies with a male lyings of a woman, the two have done taboo/ritually abhorrent thing; they shall surely be put to death; their bloodguilt is on them.
A man who takes a woman and her mother—it is wickedness; in fire they shall be burned, he and they, so there be no wickedness in your midst.
A man who gives his emission to a beast shall surely be put to death, and the beast you shall kill.
A woman who draws near to any beast to lie with it, you shall kill woman and beast; they shall surely be put to death; their bloodguilt is on them.

A man who takes his sister, daughter of his father or daughter of his mother, and sees her nakedness and she sees his nakedness, it is disgrace; they shall be cut off before eyes of children of their people. Nakedness of his sister he uncovered; he shall bear his iniquity.
A man who lies with woman in her menstruation/separation and uncovers her nakedness has laid bare her flow, and she has uncovered flow of her bloods; both shall be cut off from midst of their people.
Nakedness of your mother's sister and father's sister you shall not uncover, for he has made naked his flesh; they shall bear their iniquity.
A man who lies with his aunt has uncovered nakedness of his uncle; their sin/misalignment they shall bear; childless they shall die.
A man who takes wife of his brother, it is impurity; nakedness of his brother he uncovered; childless they shall be.
You shall keep all my statutes and all my judgments and do them, so land where I am bringing you to dwell does not vomit you out.
You shall not walk in statutes of nation that I am sending from before you; for all these they did, and I was disgusted/grieved with them.
I said to you: You shall possess their ground, and I myself will give it to you to possess, a land flowing with milk and honey. I am YHWH your Divine, who separated you from peoples.

You shall separate between clean beast and unclean, between unclean bird and clean; do not make your souls/lives detestable by beast or bird or anything that creeps on ground, which I separated for you as unclean.
You shall be holy to me, for I, YHWH, am holy, and I separated you from peoples to be mine.
A man or woman in whom is ghost/medium or familiar spirit shall surely be put to death; with stones they shall stone them; their bloodguilt is on them.

translation_notes: This chapter contains severe ancient penalty material and must be source-preserved with strong anti-violence safeguards.
Molech/child-sacrifice polemic is life-protection and sanctuary-name protection.

Leviticus 20:13 repeats the male-male boundary text with capital penalty in the ancient source; it requires deep lexical, historical, and reception-history audit and must not be used for modern violence, criminalization, bullying, or dehumanization of LGBTQ people.
Sexual-boundary penalties are embedded in land-holiness rhetoric and kinship system; do not flatten into modern identity categories.
Medium/familiar-spirit penalty material requires reception-history safeguards and must not be used against spiritual practitioners today.
safety_note: Do not weaponize Leviticus 20. The restored layer preserves a severe ancient holiness-penalty text; modern use must categorically reject vigilante violence, state violence against identity groups, religious abuse, queer hatred, misogyny, survivor-blaming, and persecution of spiritual practitioners.
